privileged_info_summary: The task uses InVesalius CT 0437 sample dataset, which is a real CT scan (Shimadzu manufacturer, 2006, 75 DICOM slices, 512×512 resolution) distributed as sample data with InVesalius software. The dataset is labeled 'InVesalius Sample' in metadata (synthetic/de-identified). The task requires 10+ craniometric measurements each ≥15 mm, STL export with ≥10,000 triangles, and three PNG screenshots each ≥10 KB. All output paths, thresholds, and technical requirements specified in metadata match their implementations in setup/export scripts and verifier logic.
